welcome: Hi! I'm Skylar the rescue pup! I need your help to save lost animals!
menu_subtitle: Pick a mission and let's fly!
q1_start: Some animals are lost! Let's learn where they live so I can rescue them!
q1_instruction: Where does this animal live? Tap the right home!
wrong: Hmm, let's try the other one!
q1_done: Amazing! You taught me where all the animals live!
q1_learned: Now I know where to fly! Let's check what I learned!
summary: Look at what you taught me!
summary_bias: I know a lot about one place, but not the others!
summary_learned: The more you teach me, the better I can rescue!
q3_start: I'll try to guess where animals live! Tell me if I'm right!
q3_retrain: I need more practice! Let's learn again!
q3_learned: I'm getting smarter! Time for a real rescue!
q4_start: Animals are in trouble! Let's fly and rescue them!
q4_crash: Oh no, we missed that one!
q4_false_alarm: Oops, that animal was already safe!
q4_done: Rescue complete! You're my best helper!
q4_learned: We make the best team! Woof!
q5_start: Final mission! Let's fly to every home and check on the animals!
q5_step1: Up, up, and away! We're flying high!
q5_step2: Checking the sky! The birds look safe up here!
q5_step3: Flying over the land! All the animals are happy!
q5_step4: Swooping over the water! The sea friends are doing great!
q5_step5: All safe! Every animal is home!
q5_done: We did it! Every animal is safe and happy!
q5_learned: You're an amazing rescue helper! See you next time!
all_done: All missions complete! You saved every animal! Woof woof!
t_sky_eagle_y: Yes! Eagles fly high in the sky!
t_sky_eagle_n: Actually, eagles live up in the sky!
t_sky_parrot_y: That's right! Parrots love to fly!
t_sky_parrot_n: Parrots are sky birds! They love to fly!
t_sky_owl_n: Owls live in the sky! They fly at night!
t_land_puppy_y: Woof! Puppies live on land, just like me!
t_land_puppy_n: Puppies live on land! Woof woof!
t_land_bunny_y: Yes! Bunnies hop on the ground!
t_land_bunny_n: Bunnies live on land! They love to hop!
t_water_dolphin_n: Dolphins live in the water! Splash!
t_water_fish_y: Blub blub! Fish swim in the water!
t_water_fish_n: Fish live in the water! Blub blub!
t_water_turtle_y: Yes! Sea turtles swim in the water!
t_water_turtle_n: Sea turtles live in the water! They love to swim!
